gates.guards: every number is regenerable from code + frozen inputs

gates.guards: no reported number is produced by an LLM

217 SAS / 217 R twin programs; 0 twin TLF-number mismatches; 0 within-design number collisions; all R parse

gates.guards: no skeptical reader can break the deliverable

0 TLF-number collisions; 0 out-of-scope eDISH/Hy's terms in programs; ICH E14 QTc reference lines in 5 QTc figures

gates.guards: AI is disclosed and bounded; a human signs
gates.evidence: 0 experimental/non-standard method labels in analysis programs; 0 PHI hits; frozen-model + human-gate discipline documented in 24 wiki pages

gates.guards: the package is navigable, linked, and internally consistent
